# Loudoun Nature Conservation Project (LNCP)

> A student-led 501(c)(3) nonprofit empowering youth to restore nature, advance
> sustainability, and foster community through environmental stewardship across
> Loudoun County, Virginia. Made by students, for students.

LNCP organizes stream cleanups, ecological restoration events, and student
research on local water and habitat health. It operates through school-based
branches led by student presidents, coordinated by an executive team and
directors.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/): Mission, impact stats, and overview
- [About](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/about/): Mission, history, and what we do
- [Team](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/team/): Student leaders, directors, and branch presidents
- [Events](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/events/): Upcoming and past cleanups, restoration events, and workshops
- [Research](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/research/): Student water-quality and ecology publications
- [Volunteer](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/volunteer/): How to join cleanups and conservation efforts
- [Funding](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/funding/): How the nonprofit is funded and supported
- [Contact](https://loudounnatureconservation.org/contact/): Partnerships, press, and general inquiries

## Facts
- Type: 501(c)(3) nonprofit, student-led
- Location: Loudoun County, Virginia, USA
- Contact: directors@loudounnatureconservation.org
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/loudounncp
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/loudounncp
